description: momentum_period=10: match bb_period for faster confirm
kc_atr_mult=1.0: tight keltner = more squeeze detections
kc_atr_mult=2.0: wide keltner = fewer stronger squeezes
vol_surge=1.2: lower bar for volume confirm
radical: very tight keltner = many squeezes
momentum_period=15: medium momentum (was bad at 14 before, but params have changed)
bb=4 kc=6: bb faster than kc
tight stop + short hold: fast exit combo
wide stop + long hold: let winners run
atr=1.3 hold=10: tighter stop, same hold
bb_std=1.5 bb=5: tighter bands on fast period
bb_std=2.5 bb=5: wider bands on fast period
kc_atr=2.0 kc=5: wider keltner with fast period
disable trailing stop: rely on signal exit + time + hard stop only
momentum_period=50: only enter during strong long-term trends
atr_period=5: match bb_period for consistent timeframe
wider BB std=1.8: higher quality squeeze entries
bb_std=2.0: back to old value, compare with 1.8
max_hold_days=12: shorter hold with tighter bb_std
